pages.text: Shaka has a new friend that only he can see.

blocks.text: Shaka has a new friend that only he can see.

pages.text: “His name is Mazi ” he tells Mama. ...but whenever Mama comes to Shaka’s room, Mazi runs and hides .

blocks.text: “His name is Mazi ” he tells Mama.
...but whenever Mama comes to Shaka’s room, Mazi runs and hides .

pages.text: Mazi likes to laugh . He makes Shaka laugh too! They roll in the grass and build castles in the sand.

blocks.text: Mazi likes to laugh . He makes Shaka laugh too!
They roll in the grass and build castles in the sand.

pages.text: “Can Mazi eat with us?” Shaka asks Papa at dinner. But when Papa looks up, Mazi hides behind the curtains.

blocks.text: “Can Mazi eat with us?” Shaka asks Papa at dinner.
But when Papa looks up, Mazi hides behind the curtains.

pages.text: One day, Mama tells Shaka, “Papa has a new job. We are moving to another town.”

blocks.text: One day, Mama tells Shaka, “Papa has a new job. We are moving to another town.”

pages.text: “Can Mazi come?” Shaka asks Mama. “Ask him.” Mama says. But Shaka can’t see Mazi anywhere .

blocks.text: “Can Mazi come?” Shaka asks Mama.
“Ask him.” Mama says. But Shaka can’t see Mazi anywhere .

pages.text: The next afternoon, the big truck comes. Soon, the house is empty.

blocks.text: The next afternoon, the big truck comes.
Soon, the house is empty.

pages.text: But Shaka can’t leave. Where has Mazi gone ?

blocks.text: But Shaka can’t leave.
Where has Mazi gone ?

pages.text: Is Mazi in the garden ? Has he jumped over the fence?

blocks.text: Is Mazi in the garden ?
Has he jumped over the fence?

pages.text: “Maybe Mazi’s Papa got a new job too,” Mama says. “He might also have moved away.”

blocks.text: “Maybe Mazi’s Papa got a new job too,” Mama says.
“He might also have moved away.”

pages.text: When Shaka gets to the new house, there is a boy next door. “My name is Matty ,” says the boy with a smile.

blocks.text: When Shaka gets to the new house, there is a boy next door.
“My name is Matty ,” says the boy with a smile.

pages.text: “Sometimes we miss old friends,” Mama says. “But there is always room in our hearts for new ones!”

blocks.text: “Sometimes we miss old friends,” Mama says.
“But there is always room in our hearts for new ones!”
